_about: Curated thresholds — facts (numbers + citations), not training data. Used by core.py to calibrate gate thresholds.

thresholds.rationale: Hip crease parallel to knee — standard 'parallel squat' definition.
thresholds.citation: NSCA Essentials of S&C, 4th ed. (Haff & Triplett, 2016).

thresholds.rationale: Full-depth squat (ass-to-grass) — knee flexion typically reaches 120-140°.
thresholds.citation: Schoenfeld BJ, J Strength Cond Res 2010; 24(12):3497-506.

thresholds.rationale: Trunk forward lean beyond ~35° from vertical increases lumbar shear; above this is treated as WARNING in MVP gates.
Frontal-plane projection angle (FPPA) — valgus ≥ 8° is associated with elevated knee-injury risk in athletic populations.
thresholds.citation: Hewett TE et al., Am J Sports Med 2005; 33(4):492-501.

thresholds.rationale: FPPA ≥ 12° flagged as CRITICAL knee valgus.
thresholds.citation: Powers CM, J Orthop Sports Phys Ther 2010; 40(2):42-51.

thresholds.rationale: Full-range push-up — elbows reach 90° flexion at the bottom.
thresholds.citation: Cogley RM et al., J Strength Cond Res 2005; 19(3):628-33.

thresholds.rationale: Hip sag / pike — shoulder-hip-ankle line deviation > 12° indicates loss of plank stability (WARNING).
Front knee flexes to ~90° at lunge bottom, shin near vertical.
thresholds.citation: Boyle M, Advances in Functional Training, 2010 (split squat criterion).

thresholds.rationale: Trunk should remain near-vertical in lunge; >15° forward lean shifts load to spine.
thresholds.citation: Schütz P et al., J Strength Cond Res 2014; 28(7):1992-2000.
Escamilla RF et al., Med Sci Sports Exerc 2001; 33(8):1345-53.

thresholds.rationale: Trunk to 30° above horizontal at start position; further forward indicates excessive lumbar shear.
Per Rule 6 — sustained joint angular velocity > 600 deg/s with Savitzky-Golay smoothing flags rapid uncontrolled movement.
thresholds.citation: Internal threshold; conservative — typical squats 200-400 deg/s (Bryanton et al., J Strength Cond Res 2012; 26(10):2820-8).
NASM Essentials of Personal Fitness Training, 2018.

thresholds.rationale: Left-vs-right same-name joint angle delta > 10° (bilateral templates only).
thresholds.citation: Ceroni D et al., Knee Surg Sports Traumatol Arthrosc 2012.

thresholds.rationale: MediaPipe pose-landmark visibility < 0.5 → treat as LOW_CONFIDENCE.
thresholds.citation: MediaPipe Pose Landmarker docs (Bazarevsky et al., arXiv:2006.10204).
